mano_cua.result_summary: useDebouncedCallback文档页所有示例仅演示窗口resize触发防抖，依赖项为稳定setState函数。页面无按钮/输入框等UI控件供用户显式更改state依赖值然后触发防抖回调，无法完成测试。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: All demos on useDebouncedCallback page use window resize event with stable setState dependencies. No interactive UI controls to change state dependency and observe debounced callback behavior.
